ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "area_fips" INTEGER /* Area FIPS code */,
  "own_code" INTEGER /* Ownership code (e.g., 0 = All owners, 1 = Private, 2 = Federal, 3 = State, 4 = Local) */,
  "industry_code" INTEGER /* Industry code */,
  "agglvl_code" INTEGER /* Aggregation level code */,
  "size_code" INTEGER /* Establishment size code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "qtr" TEXT /* Quarter of the data */,
  "disclosure_code" TEXT /* Disclosure code (e.g., None, Public, Private) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_area_fips FOREIGN KEY ("area_fips") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_industry_code FOREIGN KEY ("industry_code") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Industry code */,
  "industry_category" TEXT /* Industry category (e.g., Agriculture, Mining, Manufacturing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Location type (e.g., State, County, City) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Indicator type (e.g., employment rate, wage growth) */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the indicator (e.g., percent, dollars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_rates" (
  "employment_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment rate */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data */,
  "annual_avg_estabs" INTEGER /* Annual average establishments */,
  "annual_avg_emplvl" INTEGER /* Annual average employment level */,
  "total_annual_wages" REAL /* Total annual wages */,
  "taxable_annual_wages" REAL /* Taxable annual wages */,
  "annual_contributions" REAL /* Annual contributions */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "employment_rate_change" REAL /* Change in employment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_rates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_data" (
  "wage_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage data */,
  "employment_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment rate */,
  "annual_avg_wkly_wage" REAL /* Annual average weekly wage */,
  "avg_annual_pay" REAL /* Average annual pay */,
  "wage_growth_rate" REAL /* Wage growth rate */,
  "wage_growth_change" REAL /* Change in wage growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_employment_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_rate_id") REFERENCES employment_rates ("employment_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disclosure_codes" (
  "disclosure_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disclosure code */,
  "disclosure_code_name" TEXT /* Name of the disclosure code */,
  "disclosure_code_description" TEXT /* Description of the disclosure code */,
  "disclosure_code_type" TEXT /* Disclosure code type (e.g., public, private, confidential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disclosure_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_data" (
  "quarterly_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarterly data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data */,
  "qtr" TEXT /* Quarter of the data */,
  "annual_avg_estabs_chg" INTEGER /* Annual average establishments change */,
  "annual_avg_estabs_pct_chg" REAL /* Annual average establishments percentage change */,
  "annual_avg_emplvl_chg" INTEGER /* Annual average employment level change */,
  "annual_avg_emplvl_pct_chg" REAL /* Annual average employment level percentage change */,
  "quarterly_avg_estabs" INTEGER /* Quarterly average establishments */,
  "quarterly_avg_emplvl" INTEGER /* Quarterly average employment level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarterly_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_industries" (
  "location_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location-industry relationship */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_industries_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
